title: Asymmetric-Cost Decision Utility

delta.rationale: LC45: 10 solvers, 0.10 = 1 wrong decision, minimum resolvable granularity. LC322: conservative but consistent. Not adjusted after results are seen.

lambda_sweep.note: λ_R varies. λ_A = 1 throughout. Ratio = λ_R.

populations.note: Single-survivor skew. Results reported but not used as primary evidence. Findings on LC45 alone do not determine verdict.

falsification_criterion.PASS: exists lambda in sweep such that utility(C) - utility(B1) > delta on LC322 (primary population)
falsification_criterion.FAIL: no such lambda found on LC322 across full tested range
falsification_criterion.DEGENERATE: estimator collapses to all-ACCEPT or all-REJECT at given lambda; excluded from comparison at that lambda; not a verdict on RQ
falsification_criterion.LC45_role: stress_test only; LC45 result reported separately; does not override LC322 verdict

anti_degeneracy_rule.action: record as DEGENERATE at that lambda; exclude from primary comparison; report in results

epistemological_constraints: no negative result inflation beyond tested lambda range and tested populations
no causal language: no because, therefore, explains, caused by, due to

closure_reference.relationship: none; this phase tests a different objective function class on the same frozen populations
